title: Taxi Zadar Airport to Zagreb | Fixed €450 Transfer | TAXI Antonio
description: Private taxi and transfer from Zadar Airport to Zagreb. Fixed €450 per car, up to 4 passengers, door to door. Book direct with Antonio.
keywords: taxi zadar airport to zagreb, transfer zadar airport to zagreb, zadar airport to zagreb taxi, zadar airport to zagreb transfer

schema.name: Taxi Zadar Airport to Zagreb
schema.description: Private, fixed-price taxi and transfer from Zadar Airport to Zagreb, 450 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, door to door.

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Zadar Airport to Zagreb, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 900 euros.

mainEntity.name: Where do you meet me at Zadar Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: In the arrivals hall, just after baggage reclaim, holding a sign with your name. I help with the luggage and walk you to the car.

mainEntity.name: What if my flight is delayed?

acceptedAnswer.text: No problem. I track your flight in real time and adjust the pickup to the actual landing, with no extra charge for the wait.

mainEntity.name: How much is the transfer from Zadar Airport to Zagreb?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 450 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, tolls and luggage included. A return trip is 900.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can plan around your flight. For a same-day pickup after a sudden change, call or WhatsApp me and I will help if I can.
